name: Design Critique (Strict)
description: Like Design Critique, but the critic MUST cite [file:line] for every claim about existing code.

phases.name: Present
phases.prompt: Explain the work, goals, constraints, and what feedback you need. Cite [file:line] when referring to existing code.

phases.name: Critique
phases.prompt: Identify strengths, weaknesses, risks, and concrete improvements. Provide your own independent analysis. Any claim about existing code MUST cite [file:line]. Uncited claims will be treated as hypotheses and ignored.

phases.name: Synthesis
phases.prompt: Turn the discussion into prioritised recommendations: keep / change / investigate. Reference [file:line] for each item. If the synthesis exceeds ~30 lines, Write it to .agentchattr/artifacts/session-{session_id}/critique-synthesis.md and reference the path in chat.
